description_long: This wooden bungalow features a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof with decorative scalloped eaves and a sunburst motif in the gable end. The structure is surrounded by a light-colored picket fence, enclosing a spacious front porch with a covered entryway and steps leading up to the main door. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the windows are fitted with simple shutters. The porch is supported by turned wooden posts and has a railing that matches the fence. The bungalow sits on a raised foundation, and the overall design evokes a traditional, rustic charm suitable for suburban or park settings. The open gate and visible steps suggest easy access to the porch and main entrance.
description: A charming wooden bungalow with a steep gable roof, decorative eaves, and a wraparound picket fence enclosing a covered porch. The structure features wood siding, shuttered windows, and a sunburst gable detail.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main porch, decorative gable, and the open gate leading to the steps.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the entry steps, open gate, and the sunburst motif in the gable above the porch.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the length of the bungalow, symmetrical window placement, and the continuous picket fence.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back wall with shuttered windows and the uninterrupted fence line.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical side windows with a single front window and shutters
